zh.Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾達文波特
zh.Swettenham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯維頓哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Davenport於1378年5月1日出生在英國爾阿斯特伯里時，他的父親Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable66歲，母親Joyce de Mainwaring25歲。他於大約1400年與Joan de Leigh在英國爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年9月30日在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾達文波特
zh-hans.Swettenham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯維頓哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Davenport于1378年5月1日出生在英国爾阿斯特伯里时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable66岁，母亲Joyce de Mainwaring25岁。他于大约1400年与Joan de Leigh在英国爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年9月30日在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Davenport was born on 1 May 1378, in Astbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable, was 66 and his mother, Joyce de Mainwaring, was 25. He married Joan de Leigh about 1400, in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 30 September 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Davenport est né le 1 mai 1378, à Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Joyce de Mainwaring, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Leigh environ 1400, à Thurstaston, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Davenport am 1. Mai 1378 in Astbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable 66 und seine Mutter Joyce de Mainwaring 25. Er hat um 1400 in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England Joan de Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1415 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Davenport è nato il il 1 maggio 1378 nel Astbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Joyce de Mainwaring, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Leigh circa 1400, nel Thurstaston, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Davenportが1378年5月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constableは66歳，母Joyce de Mainwaringは25歳であった。約1400年にイギリスチェシュアイアスウルスタストンでJoan de Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年9月30日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Davenport(이)가 1378년 5월 1일 영국 체실르 애스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce de Mainwaring(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 체실르 스르스타스턴에서 Joan de Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 9월 30일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 May 1378–30 September 1415: 1 de maio de 1378–30 de setembro de 1415
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Davenport nasceu em 1 de maio de 1378, em Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de Mainwaring, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Leigh aproximadamente 1400, em Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1415, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Davenport родился 1 мая 1378 г. в местности астбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce de Mainwaring, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Leigh около 1400 г. в местности турстастон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.1 May 1378–30 September 1415: 1 de mayo de 1378–30 de septiembre de 1415
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Davenport nació el 1 de mayo de 1378, en Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Joyce de Mainwaring, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan de Leigh aproximadamente 1400, en Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
